chunks.text:
Welcome to Brightspace
**Please read the following introduction carefully and follow
any instructions closely!**
FIRST, Turn ON some notifications:
1.Click your name in the top right corner and then click on
notifications

2.Under Contact Methods make sure it's showing your correct
@g.eips.ca email and then PLEASE register a mobile (cell)
number.  The preferred method of contact will be instant
messaging.
chunks.titleGuess: **Please read the following introduction carefully and follow

chunks.text:
3.Under Instant Notifications please turn on ​both
Announcement options​ and the ​Quizzes option ​(and any
others you may want - but those two are MUST HAVES!)
